prompt: Write a HypeTalk mouseUp handler that toggles the animation of image 'chick'.
In a sprite-area scene, on every frame, if the cursor is over the blue_ball sprite, scale its velocity by 1.5× exactly once per hover (not every frame while hovering).
Sprite-area keyDown handler that sets the player's velocity to 250 px/s in the direction matching WASD.
On beginContact in a sprite scene, if the other node is 'coin', add 10 to the score global and update label 'score_label'.
Script for a button that goes to the next card.
Which tool and what tool arguments should you call to set the sprite area 'playfield' scene's background color to black?
You need to install a keyDown handler on the scene inside sprite area 'game_area'. Which tool do you use?
Toggle the animated property of image 'logo' between true and false.
Set only the X component of sprite 'ball' velocity to 200 without disturbing Y.
Read the current mouse X and Y into variables mx and my inside on frameUpdate.
What's the current text of field 'score'?
Read the current velocity X of sprite 'ball' in sprite area 'playfield'.
List every node in the 'arena' sprite area's active scene.
How many cards are in this stack and what are their names?
Set the stack script to initialize a score global on openStack.
Give card 'intro' a script that plays a sound on openCard.
Attach a script to the 'title' background that plays intro music on openBackground.
Add a score label to the 'game_area' sprite area at the top, 24pt white.
Add a red circle shape named 'orb' to sprite area 'arena' at center 400,300 radius 40.
Create a fire emitter called 'fire' at 200,100 of sprite area 'stage' emitting red particles upward.
Create a pin joint between sprite 'arm' and sprite 'shoulder' in sprite area 'ragdoll'.
Set the player sprite's alpha to 0.6 in sprite area 'arena'.
Give sprite 'ball' in sprite area 'playfield' a restitution of 1 and zero friction.
Bump the score field by 10.
Change the gravity of sprite area 'playfield' to zero.

Create the script on the bounder object on this card with one that sets all sprites in motion with physics, bouncing off the perimeter of the scene and each other. Have the script look for if the mouse intersects the location of the blue_ball sprite and, if it ever does, increase the velocity of the blue_ball by 50% each time.
What is the width of the current stack?
Set the width of the current stack to 1024.
What background is the current card using?
Set the current card marked property to true.
How many cards use the current background?
Rename the current background to shared_ui.
